national_symbols.motto: En unión y libertad (In Unity and Freedom)

foreign_policy.strategic_vision: Leading voice in Latin America, bridge between emerging economies and developed world, champion of multilateral solutions

historical_evolution.policy: Leftward shift, South-South cooperation, UNASUR focus
Return to Peronism, debt crisis management
Libertarian turn under Milei, economic shock therapy, pivot to USA

BRA.last_major_event: 2026-03-08: Milei-Lula bilateral summit on trade harmonization
BRA.brief_summary: Despite recent political differences between libertarian Argentina and leftist Brazil, MERCOSUR binds them as top trading partners. Brotherly rivalry with deep cultural and economic ties.

key_milestones.event: Argentina-Brazil War over Uruguay (ended in Uruguayan independence)

historical.historical_context: From colonial rivals to regional partners, the relationship has matured into South America's most important bilateral tie.

infrastructure_projects.name: Porto Alegre - Buenos Aires Highway Upgrade

challenges.status: Persistent Argentine deficit, source of tension
challenges.details: Argentina imports more manufactured goods than it exports to Brazil

challenges.status: Ideological gap between Milei (right) and Lula (left)
challenges.details: Personal tensions, but pragmatism prevails on trade
Brazil pushes for deal, Argentina cautious on agriculture

challenges.status: Argentine peso instability affects bilateral trade
challenges.details: Frequent need to renegotiate payment terms

opportunities.potential: Argentina exports gas, Brazil invests in Vaca Muerta shale
Joint processing, branding of products for Asia
Joint solar/wind projects in Patagonia and Northeast Brazil

utopia_scenario.vision: A fully integrated South American economic powerhouse
utopia_scenario.economic_gain: +$85 billion combined GDP by 2035 through seamless trade and infrastructure
utopia_scenario.innovation: Joint aerospace industry rivaling Embraer, shared satellite network covering all South America
utopia_scenario.geopolitical: Unified South American voice in global affairs, MERCOSUR expands to full customs union
utopia_scenario.people: Visa-free travel, dual citizenship, 500,000 students exchange annually
utopia_scenario.infrastructure: High-speed rail Buenos Aires-São Paulo-Rio (12 hours), integrated energy grid
utopia_scenario.environmental: Amazon preservation fund backed by Argentine agriculture revenue, shared renewable energy reaching 80% by 2040
utopia_scenario.symbolic: Joint bid for 2038 FIFA World Cup as 'United South America' succeeds

USA.last_major_event: 2026-02-20: Milei's state visit to Washington, IMF deal revision
USA.brief_summary: After decades of tension over debt and leftist governments, Milei's pro-US pivot has warmed relations. Major IMF debtor seeks American investment and trade.

key_milestones.event: First Argentine Constitution influenced by US model
Argentina reluctantly joins Allies in WWII
Falklands/Malvinas War - US sides with UK
Menem aligns Argentina with US, sends troops to Gulf War
AMIA bombing strains relations over Iran
Milei election - strongest US alignment in decades

historical.historical_context: Cyclical relationship: warm during right-wing governments, cool during Peronist/leftist periods. Always complicated by IMF debt dynamics.

bilateral_mechanisms: Joint Commission on Science and Technology

diplomatic_issues.us_position: Supports UK sovereignty, neutral on negotiations

imf_program.status: Under review 2026, Milei seeks new terms
imf_program.us_influence: USA holds 17.4% IMF voting power, crucial for Argentina

defense.historical_note: Argentina used US weapons in Falklands War (1982), creating awkward legacy

exchange_programs: Young Leaders of the Americas Initiative

flight_routes: Buenos Aires - New York JFK (5x weekly)

visa_requirements.us_to_arg: Visa-free for tourism up to 90 days (reciprocity fee abolished 2016)

multilateral.cooperation: Both members, collaborate on financial regulation
Active members, sometimes diverge on Venezuela/Cuba
Argentina seeks US support for Security Council reform

multilateral.dynamic: USA key to Argentina's debt negotiations

challenges.status: Ongoing negotiations, political hot potato in Argentina
US supports UK, source of Argentine frustration
challenges.details: Milei has softened rhetoric but claim remains

challenges.status: Argentine agricultural products face US tariffs/quotas
Past disputes over pharmaceuticals, mostly resolved
challenges.details: Argentina on USTR watch list occasionally

opportunities.potential: Vaca Muerta shale could make Argentina net exporter, US technology key
Argentina holds 2nd largest lithium reserves, US seeks supply chains
Argentina seeks greater US market access for beef, wine, soybeans
Argentine software talent, US venture capital
CONAE (Argentine space agency) partners with NASA on Earth observation

upcoming_agreements: Potential Free Trade Agreement (Milei priority, unlikely near-term)

utopia_scenario.vision: Argentina as US's premier South American partner
utopia_scenario.economic_gain: +$120 billion Argentine GDP by 2035 through investment, debt relief, and FTA
utopia_scenario.innovation: Silicon Valley South in Buenos Aires - regional tech hub with US backing, joint space missions, lithium battery gigafactories
utopia_scenario.geopolitical: Argentina mediates US-Latin America relations, Falklands resolved via US-brokered compromise (shared sovereignty?), IMF debt forgiven in exchange for strategic alignment
utopia_scenario.people: Visa-free travel both ways, 50,000 students exchange annually, digital nomad visas, brain drain reversed as Argentine talent stays home
utopia_scenario.infrastructure: US invests $20B in Argentine rail/ports, becomes logistics hub for South America
utopia_scenario.environmental: Joint investment in Patagonian wind farms powers green hydrogen exports to US
utopia_scenario.symbolic: Argentina hosts Summit of the Americas 2032, Messi becomes US-Argentine soccer ambassador, joint Antarctica conservation treaty

CHN.last_major_event: 2026-01-15: Argentine soybean export deal worth $8B despite Milei's campaign rhetoric
CHN.brief_summary: Despite Milei's anti-China campaign promises, pragmatism prevails. China is Argentina's #2 trading partner and critical creditor. Relationship balances economic needs with US alignment pressure.

key_milestones.event: Argentina joins Belt & Road Initiative (MOU signed)
Milei elected - campaign anti-China, governance pragmatic

historical.historical_context: From distant ideological allies to deep economic interdependence driven by China's commodity hunger and Argentina's export economy.

bilateral_mechanisms: Joint Commission on Economic and Trade Cooperation
political_notes: Milei reversed campaign pledge to cut ties, pragmatism won
Argentina recognizes One China policy (Taiwan not recognized)

currency_swap.purpose: Support peso, facilitate trade, reduce dollar dependency

debt_to_china.concerns: Third largest creditor after IMF and Paris Club

security_concerns: US pressure to limit Chinese tech in defense

cultural_events: Chinese New Year celebrations in Buenos Aires Chinatown

multilateral.cooperation: Both members, coordinate on development finance

multilateral.status: Argentina MOU signatory (2017), limited projects so far
Argentina invited to join 2024, Milei declined (major shift)

multilateral.cooperation: Align on climate, development; diverge on human rights

challenges.status: Milei's libertarian, pro-US stance vs. China's state model
Argentina imports far more than exports (except ag products)
challenges.details: Threatens local manufacturing, textile industry decimated

challenges.status: $15B owed, currency swap critical for peso stability
challenges.details: Argentina vulnerable to Chinese economic leverage

challenges.status: Washington wants Buenos Aires to limit Chinese tech/infrastructure
challenges.details: Huawei 5G, space station, port projects scrutinized

challenges.status: Conspiracy theories about Chinese land grabs

opportunities.potential: Argentina supplies feed, China pork expertise, joint ventures
Chinese tech + Argentine lithium = battery production
Chinese solar/wind tech for Patagonia, exports to China
Both have Antarctic bases, joint scientific missions

future_potential.condition: If Milei maintains pragmatism, not ideology

utopia_scenario.vision: Argentina as China's gateway to South America, balancing US ties
utopia_scenario.economic_gain: +$95 billion Argentine GDP by 2035 through industrial cooperation, not just commodity exports
utopia_scenario.innovation: Joint lithium battery gigafactory employing 50,000, Argentine beef/wine dominate Chinese middle-class market (5M tons annually), technology transfer builds Argentine manufacturing
utopia_scenario.geopolitical: Argentina mediates US-China trade disputes in Latin America, currency swap eliminates peso crises, BRICS membership reconsidered with guarantees
utopia_scenario.people: 500,000 Chinese tourists annually boost Patagonia economy, 20,000 students exchange, Mandarin/Spanish bilingual generation
utopia_scenario.infrastructure: Chinese-funded high-speed rail Córdoba-Buenos Aires, Port of Bahía Blanca becomes South America's largest (Chinese investment), fiber optic network nationwide
utopia_scenario.environmental: Joint Patagonia wind/solar reaches 50GW, green hydrogen ships to China replace coal, Antarctic treaty renewed with conservation focus
utopia_scenario.symbolic: Xi visits Iguazu Falls, Milei's successor attends BRI summit, Argentine wine becomes #1 import in China, Messi opens soccer academy in Beijing

mercosur.summary: Core of Argentine foreign policy, despite recent friction under Milei. Economic integration incomplete but symbolically vital.
challenges: Milei wants flexibility for bilateral FTAs (against MERCOSUR rules)

chile.summary: Close despite historical rivalries, Andes separate but connect them. Major trade partner.

uruguay.summary: Fraternal relationship, cultural similarities, joint paper mills dispute resolved.
uruguay.unique_aspect: Share Río de la Plata, joint environmental management

paraguay.summary: MERCOSUR partner, Argentina major destination for Paraguayan migrants.

bolivia.summary: Energy imports (natural gas), large Bolivian diaspora in Argentina.
bolivia.key_issue: Bolivian lithium potential, Argentine interest in joint ventures

g20.significance: Only South American member besides Brazil

international_organizations: CELAC (Community of Latin American and Caribbean States)
Non-Aligned Movement (historically active, less so now)

malvinas_falklands.argentine_position: Sovereignty claim over Malvinas/Falklands, South Georgia, South Sandwich Islands
malvinas_falklands.history: 1982 war with UK (lost), ongoing UN negotiations
malvinas_falklands.current_status: Milei softened rhetoric but maintains claim, UK refuses talks
malvinas_falklands.international_support: Latin America backs Argentina (CELAC), UK has control

antarctica.claim: Argentine Antarctica (overlaps with Chilean and British claims)

human_rights.legacy: Dirty War (1976-1983) shaped modern human rights advocacy
human_rights.current_stance: Strong supporter of ICC, human rights treaties

climate_change.commitment: Paris Agreement signatory, targets net-zero by 2050
climate_change.vulnerabilities: Glacier melt in Andes, Pampas desertification
climate_change.opportunities: Renewable energy exports (wind, solar, green hydrogen)

debt_crisis.impact_on_foreign_policy: Constrains autonomy, forces alignment with creditors

nation_branding.slogan: Argentina Late: Passion that moves you
nation_branding.focus: Tourism (Patagonia, Iguazu, Buenos Aires), wine/food exports
nation_branding.challenges: Economic instability, political volatility damage image

diaspora.engagement: Voting rights abroad, Argentines Abroad Program

optimistic_scenario.description: Milei's reforms stabilize economy, IMF debt restructured, lithium boom begins

pessimistic_scenario.description: Reforms fail, social unrest, default on IMF, isolation

most_likely_scenario.description: Muddling through - partial reforms, modest growth, continued debt struggles
most_likely_scenario.foreign_relations: Pragmatic ties with all powers, no major breakthroughs

known_data_gaps: Exact Milei government policy shifts (rapid changes)
data_quality_notes.update_frequency: Quarterly for trade data, monthly for political events
